events.headline: "Attention Is All You Need" paper published
events.summary: Google Brain and Google Research publish the Transformer architecture paper, foundational to modern LLMs.

events.headline: GPT-1 released
events.summary: OpenAI releases the first Generative Pre-trained Transformer model.

events.headline: BERT released
events.summary: Google releases BERT, a bidirectional Transformer model that set new benchmarks across NLP tasks.

events.headline: GPT-3 released
events.summary: OpenAI releases GPT-3 with 175 billion parameters, demonstrating strong few-shot learning.

events.headline: ChatGPT launched
events.summary: OpenAI launches ChatGPT, bringing LLM interaction to the general public.

events.headline: Google Bard announced
events.summary: Google announces Bard, its conversational AI service powered by LaMDA.

events.headline: Llama 1 released
events.summary: Meta releases LLaMA, its first open-weight large language model, initially for researchers.

events.headline: GPT-4 released
events.summary: OpenAI releases GPT-4, a multimodal large language model.

events.headline: Claude 1 released
events.summary: Anthropic releases Claude 1, its first publicly available large language model.

events.headline: Claude 2 released
events.summary: Anthropic releases Claude 2 with improved coding, math, and reasoning capabilities.

events.headline: Llama 2 released
events.summary: Meta releases Llama 2, an open-weight large language model family available for commercial use.

events.headline: Mistral 7B released
events.summary: Mistral AI releases its first model, a 7-billion-parameter open-weight model that outperforms Llama 2 13B on all benchmarks.

events.headline: Gemini 1.0 released
events.summary: Google DeepMind releases Gemini, a natively multimodal model family.

events.headline: Sora announced
events.summary: OpenAI announces Sora, a text-to-video generative model.

events.headline: Gemini 1.5 Pro released
events.summary: Google DeepMind releases Gemini 1.5 Pro with a 1-million-token context window.

events.headline: Mistral Large released
events.summary: Mistral AI releases its first frontier-class model, competitive with GPT-4.

events.headline: Claude 3 released
events.summary: Anthropic releases the Claude 3 model family (Haiku, Sonnet, Opus).

events.headline: Llama 3 released
events.summary: Meta releases Llama 3 in 8B and 70B parameter variants.

events.headline: GPT-4o released
events.summary: OpenAI releases GPT-4o ("omni"), a natively multimodal model with voice, vision, and text.

events.headline: Claude 3.5 Sonnet released
events.summary: Anthropic releases Claude 3.5 Sonnet, outperforming Claude 3 Opus at lower cost.

events.headline: Llama 3.1 405B released
events.summary: Meta releases Llama 3.1 with a 405-billion-parameter open-weight model.

events.headline: OpenAI o1-preview released
events.summary: OpenAI releases o1-preview, a model trained with reinforcement learning to perform complex reasoning.

events.headline: Gemini 2.0 Flash released
events.summary: Google DeepMind releases Gemini 2.0 Flash with agentic capabilities.

events.headline: OpenAI o3 announced
events.summary: OpenAI announces o3, a next-generation reasoning model, initially available to researchers.

events.headline: DeepSeek-R1 released
events.summary: DeepSeek releases R1, an open-weight reasoning model competitive with leading Western models.

events.headline: Grok 3 released
events.summary: xAI releases Grok 3, claiming state-of-the-art reasoning benchmarks.

events.headline: Claude 3.7 Sonnet released
events.summary: Anthropic releases Claude 3.7 Sonnet with extended thinking capability.

events.headline: Gemini 2.5 Pro released
events.summary: Google DeepMind releases Gemini 2.5 Pro, a thinking model with strong reasoning and coding.

events.headline: Llama 4 Scout and Maverick released
events.summary: Meta releases Llama 4 Scout and Maverick, the first open-weight natively multimodal MoE models.

events.headline: OpenAI o4-mini released
events.summary: OpenAI releases o4-mini, a compact but powerful reasoning model in the o-series.

events.headline: Claude 4 Opus and Sonnet released
events.summary: Anthropic releases Claude 4 Opus and Claude 4 Sonnet with major capability gains.

events.headline: Mistral Magistral released
events.summary: Mistral AI releases Magistral Small (open-source) and Medium, its first reasoning models with chain-of-thought capabilities.

events.headline: GPT-5 released
events.summary: OpenAI releases GPT-5, a major leap in intelligence across coding, math, writing, and vision.

events.headline: Claude Haiku 4.5 released
events.summary: Anthropic releases Claude Haiku 4.5, a fast and cost-efficient model.

events.headline: Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Opus 4.5 released
events.summary: Anthropic releases Claude 4.5 Sonnet and Opus with further capability improvements.

events.headline: Mistral 3 family released
events.summary: Mistral AI releases the Mistral 3 family: Large 3 frontier model plus nine dense open-weight models.

events.headline: Claude Opus 4.6 released
events.summary: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.6.

events.headline: Claude Sonnet 4.6 released
events.summary: Anthropic releases Claude Sonnet 4.6 with improved agentic search and lower token consumption.

events.headline: Gemini 3.1 Pro released
events.summary: Google DeepMind releases Gemini 3.1 Pro with significantly improved reasoning.

events.headline: GPT-5.4 Mini and Nano released
events.summary: OpenAI releases GPT-5.4 Mini and Nano, cost-efficient versions of their flagship model.

events.headline: OECD AI Principles adopted
events.summary: OECD member countries adopt principles for trustworthy AI.

events.headline: EU AI Act proposed
events.summary: European Commission publishes its proposal for a regulation on artificial intelligence.

events.headline: China AI algorithm regulation effective
events.summary: China's regulation on deep synthesis (deepfakes) and algorithmic recommendation comes into force.

events.headline: China Generative AI regulation effective
events.summary: China's Interim Measures for the Management of Generative AI Services take effect.

events.headline: US Executive Order on AI
events.summary: President Biden signs Executive Order 14110 on safe, secure, and trustworthy AI.

events.headline: EU AI Act adopted by Parliament
events.summary: European Parliament votes to adopt the EU AI Act.

events.headline: EU AI Act enters into force
events.summary: The EU AI Act is published in the Official Journal and enters into force.

events.headline: Switzerland FADP fully effective
events.summary: Switzerland's revised Federal Act on Data Protection (nFADP) is fully in effect, with relevance to AI data processing.

events.headline: EU AI Act — prohibited practices apply
events.summary: The EU AI Act's provisions on prohibited AI practices and AI literacy obligations become applicable.

events.headline: Japan AI Promotion Act effective
events.summary: Japan's Act on the Promotion of Research and Development and Utilisation of AI-Related Technologies takes effect.

events.headline: EU AI Act — GPAI model rules apply
events.summary: Rules for general-purpose AI models and governance obligations under the EU AI Act become applicable.

events.headline: EU AI Act — high-risk system rules apply
events.summary: Obligations for high-risk AI systems (Annex III) and transparency rules under the EU AI Act become applicable.

events.headline: EU AI Act — full enforcement
events.summary: Full roll-out of the EU AI Act, including obligations for high-risk AI systems under existing harmonisation legislation.
